Registry / Terms / auxiliary battery

auxiliary battery

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #02250-D011 · 5 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.
  2. MEDIUM 4 distinct definitions — harmonise.

Publication instances

4 distinct definitions across 5 publications. 1 definitions are shared by multiple publications (merge candidates).

2 identical202X
battery that is (a)mounted in, or connected to, an instrument that can also be powered by the mains power, and (b)capable of completely powering the instrument for a reasonable period of time.
Ed.YearPublicationClauseG 18 #Consistency
202X2025OIML R142-1:20253.3303709pending

3 unique definitions (each used by only one publication)

Ed.YearPublicationClauseG 18 #Definition
202X2021OIML R060:2021A.1.1502897
battery that is mounted in, or connected to, an instrument that can also be powered by the mains power as well, and capable of supplying powering to the complete instrument for a reasonable period of time. (OIML D 11, 3.25)
pending
202X2013OIML D011:20133.2502250-D011
battery that is mounted in, or connected to, an instrument that can be powered by the mains power as well, and capable of supplying power to the complete instrument for a reasonable period of time.
pending
20102004OIML D 11:20043.2300256
battery that is: • Mounted in, or connected to, an instrument that can be powered by the mains power as well; and • Capable of completely powering the instrument for a reasonable period of time
pending
